### **🎧 Vozz Rich | Electronic Press Kit (EPK)**  
**📧 Email:** vozzrich@gmail.com  
**📱 Phone:** 310-989-8178  
**🌐 Website:** [https://vozzrich.com/](https://vozzrich.com/)  

---

### **🌟 About Vozz Rich**  
Vozz Rich is a dynamic US-based producer and DJ with roots in Mexico and California. His signature sound is a fusion of Detroit house, underground rave culture, salsa, techno, and big room influences. Known for his innovative sound design and production techniques, Vozz Rich creates tracks that are both groundbreaking and dance-floor-ready.  

**🎶 Genres:**  
- Electronic  
- House  
- Dance  

---

### **🔥 Notable Releases & Collaborations**  
**📅 2024 Releases:**  
▶️ "Back To The Beat"  
▶️ "Breathless" (with L25)  
▶️ "Butterflies - Remix" (with Artsychoke)  
▶️ "House Ablaze"  

**🎤 Collaborations:**  
🤝 L25, Artsychoke, Jaytor, Kicevski, and more!  

**Listen Here:**  
🎧 [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/27sSKrytmUXukDnMGPXNHQ)

---

### **🛠️ Unique Sound Design & Production Techniques**  
Vozz Rich is a sonic innovator, blending:  
🛸 Detroit-inspired synths  
🌶️ Latin rhythms and percussion  
🎚️ Big room energy and underground rave aesthetics  
His tracks are meticulously crafted to captivate both the dance floor and the listener.
